etymology.description: зљЃ is a variant traditional form of зљ‚, which is a variant of ж—© (zЗЋo, 'early') originally meaning 'acorn'.
etymology.interpretation: зљЃ is an archaic form connected to зљ‚ (zГ o, 'acorn') and related to ж—© (zЗЋo, 'early'). Historically, it reflects an early usage of the term for 'acorn,' showing how Chinese characters borrow forms for phonetic or semantic reasons.
